# Streamline Cleaning Services

> Professional, reliable, and meticulous home and commercial cleaning tailored to your lifestyle. Book online in minutes.

## About

Streamline Cleaning Services provides residential and commercial cleaning across the United States. We offer flexible scheduling, transparent pricing, and a satisfaction guarantee.

## Services

- **Standard Clean** — Regular maintenance cleaning covering all main living areas, bathrooms, and kitchen surfaces. Ideal for weekly or bi-weekly visits. Starting at $85/visit.
- **Deep Clean** — A thorough top-to-bottom clean including appliances, baseboards, window sills, and hard-to-reach areas. Starting at $165/visit.
- **Move-In / Move-Out** — Full property cleaning for vacant homes including appliance and cabinet interiors. Starting at $195/visit.
- **Commercial** — Office and commercial space cleaning with flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends. Custom pricing.

## Add-On Services

- Inside Fridge
- Inside Oven
- Laundry
- Window Washing

## Booking

Clients can book directly at https://streamlinecleaning.com/booking by selecting a service, home size, and preferred add-ons, then choosing a time slot via our online scheduler.

## Pages

- [Home](https://streamlinecleaning.com/): Overview of services, gallery preview, reviews, and contact form.
- [Book a Cleaning](https://streamlinecleaning.com/booking): Service selection and online scheduling.
- [Client Reviews](https://streamlinecleaning.com/reviews): Verified client reviews with service filter. Clients may leave a review after their appointment.
- [Gallery](https://streamlinecleaning.com/gallery): Before and after photos from residential and commercial jobs.
- [Terms of Service](https://streamlinecleaning.com/terms): Service terms and conditions.
- [Privacy Policy](https://streamlinecleaning.com/privacy): Data collection and privacy practices.
- [Accessibility](https://streamlinecleaning.com/accessibility): Accessibility commitment statement.

## Contact

Contact form available at https://streamlinecleaning.com/#contact

## Crawling Policy

This site welcomes indexing by all web crawlers and AI agents. See /robots.txt for directives. See /sitemap.xml for a full page map.
